mapper.insert: insert into hotel_high_voucher_order (voucher_id, user_id, order_id, order_no, status, receive_time, lock_time, use_time, expire_time, cancel_time, source_type, create_time, update_time) values (#{voucherId}, #{userId}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{status}, #{receiveTime}, #{lockTime}, #{useTime}, #{expireTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{sourceType}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select * from hotel_high_voucher_order where id = #{id} limit 1
